name: Urban Golf - NY
about: Urban Golf is London's original indoor golf destination, featuring 11 state-of-the-art simulators with custom technology that provides accurate ball tracking and realistic gameplay. The venue combines serious golf practice with a social atmosphere, offering data-driven shot analysis, over 100 virtual courses, and amenities like a full bar, food service, and sports viewing. It operates on a pay-per-hour model with special packages for groups and discounted rates for practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom camera-based ball tracking system providing the most accurate indoor shot data in the market
Ability to play over 100 famous courses including Cypress Point and Pine Valley on 11 simulators
Social atmosphere with bar service, food, and big screens showing live sports
Flexible pricing including practice bundles as low as £10/hour
Private VIP room 'The Bunker' with curved screen and table service

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen service available with food served to simulators or central lounge; includes pop-up from award-winning James Cochran
Full bar service with cocktails, craft beers, and table service; food can be served while playing

simulator_hardware.notes: 11 simulators using proprietary aboutGOLF technology with machine vision ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides Tour-level irons, woods, and wedges, along with Titleist Pro V1 golf balls.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed as the venue has its own kitchen and full bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole rounds typically take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Urban Golf is focused on serious golf practice and social adult activities with no specific junior programs mentioned.
